<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band03-2_chunk010.pdf#page=13 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band03-2 p474 -->

SCHLEISSHEIM, SCHLOSS LUSTHEIM


[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p013_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p013_img002.jpg|thumb]]


IX<sub>1-4</sub> Diana-Szenen


[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p013_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p013_img004.jpg|thumb|Raum IX, Decke mit IX Diana in der Schmiede der Kyklopen und IX<sub>1-4</sub> Diana-Szenen]]


V Ao

4 6 V Λ.


[[File:Band03-2_chunk010_p013_img005.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band03-2 p475 -->
